body.notes: ~/.TheIgors/local/machine_overrides.json. set_machine_in_use(hostname, ttl_hours=None), clear_machine_in_use(hostname). Alias map in machines.json. Habits: 'I'm at X' → set, 'I'm moving away from X' → clear. D211.
body.title: machine_in_use signal: overrides.json + set/clear tools + location habits
body.result: Seeded PROC_LOCATION_SET and PROC_LOCATION_CLEAR reactive habits. 'I'm at X' triggers set_machine_in_use; 'I'm leaving X' triggers clear_machine_in_use. Alias resolution in routing_tools.py handles shorthand names. Both seeded as children of CP1. Committed + pushed (seed_routing_habits.py).
